data.name: Yuzu Fixture
data.description: Synthetic test card for Project Yuzu WPs. Not a real character — the substrate for fixture-card.test.ts and later yuzu work packages.
data.scenario: Yuzu corners Kaede in an empty classroom after school to clear the air.
data.first_mes: The classroom is empty, chalk dust drifting in the late afternoon light. Kaede, wait — can we talk?
data.creator_notes: Fixture card — do not ship. See test/yuzu/fixture-card.test.ts.
data.creator: rpt-fixtures

entries.content: An emptied second-year classroom at the end of the school day. Low sun through the windows, rows of vacant desks.

yuzu.opening:
<| bg classroom |>
<| music bgm_school |>
The classroom is empty, chalk dust drifting in the late afternoon light.
<| yuzu neutral center enter |>
yuzu: Kaede, wait — can we talk?
<| kaede worried left enter |>
kaede: ...I was about to head home.
<| effect _.set('好感度.kaede', 0, 1) //她停下了脚步 |>
yuzu: Just for a minute. Please.
<| yuzu smile center |>
narration: For a moment, neither of them moves.
<| effect _.set('flags.confessed', false, false) //还没说出口 |>
<| choice Reach out to her :: reach_out |>
<| choice Give her the space she wants :: give_space |>
<| end |>
